Localization.Description: Firewall event - packet allowed or denied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: {protocol} packet from {src.ip}:{src.port} to {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is allowed by the ACL rule "{subject.name}"
{protocol} packet from {src.ip}:{src.port} to {dst.ip}:{dst.port} is denied by the ACL rule "{subject.name}"
